item.title: Quoting Tim Schilling 摘要
item.description:
The article argues that using LLMs to contribute to Django or open-source projects without understanding the context, tickets, solutions, or PR feedback harms the community. It emphasizes that open-source contribution is a communal, human endeavor, and relying on LLMs as a primary vehicle rather than a complementary tool demoralizes reviewers and removes humanity from the experience. The author urges contributors to invest genuine time and understanding rather than just generating tokens.
标签: AI-ethics, open-source, generative-AI, AI, Django, LLMs, community, software-development, human-collaboration, code-review

item.title: Why Are We Still Doing This? 摘要
item.description:
The article critiques the AI industry's hype and financial claims, arguing that AI boosters should stop using future-tense language to describe current capabilities. It highlights financial discrepancies at Anthropic and OpenAI, noting Anthropic's $5 billion lifetime revenue against $10 billion in compute costs and questioning OpenAI's reported revenue growth. The author challenges comparisons to Uber, emphasizing that AI companies' subscription-based models differ fundamentally from Uber's transaction-based business. The piece calls for more critical scrutiny of AI economics and proof of profitability.
标签: AI, business, finance, critique, hype, Anthropic, OpenAI, Uber, economics, subscription

item.title: You Might Debate It — If You Could See It 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses how design guidelines that might spark debate if proposed explicitly within a team are often implicitly embedded in LLMs (like Codex) used for generating outputs. It highlights the opacity of such baked-in instructions in generative tools, raising concerns about unknowingly adopting someone else's design philosophy when offloading creative work. The author reflects on the tension between explicit team consensus and the hidden influence of AI tools on craft.
标签: design, AI, LLM, guidelines, opacity, generative tools, craft, ethics, frontend, team collaboration

item.title: Fox Sports to Broadcast U.S.-Venezuela World Baseball Classic Final in Immersive 3D — But Not on Vision Pro 摘要
item.description:
Fox Sports is broadcasting the World Baseball Classic Final in an immersive 3D experience exclusively through the Fox Sports XR app for the Galaxy XR headset powered by Android XR, as announced on Twitter/X. Notably, this immersive broadcast is not available on Apple's Vision Pro headset. The standard Fox Sports app remains native only to iOS devices (iPhone, iPad), Apple TV, and Apple Watch, highlighting a platform-specific approach to extended reality (XR) content.
标签: XR, immersive, broadcast, sports, Android XR, Galaxy XR, Apple Vision Pro, platform-exclusive, Fox Sports, 3D

item.title: GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano, which can describe 76,000 photos for $52 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.4 mini and nano models, expanding the GPT-5.4 family released two weeks ago. Benchmarks show GPT-5.4 nano outperforms the previous GPT-5 mini at maximum reasoning effort, while the new mini is twice as fast. Pricing is competitive, with GPT-5.4 nano at $0.20 per million input tokens, cheaper than Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite. The article includes a practical example using GPT-5.4 nano for image description, costing 0.069 cents for 2,751 input and 112 output tokens, and demonstrates model comparisons through AI-generated art of pelicans riding bicycles across different reasoning effort levels.
标签: AI, OpenAI, GPT-5.4, LLM, pricing, benchmarks, image-description, generative-AI, model-comparison, vision-LLMs

item.title: Quoting Ken Jin 摘要
item.description:
The CPython JIT for Python 3.15 has achieved its performance targets ahead of schedule, showing an 11-12% speed improvement over the tail calling interpreter on macOS AArch64 and a 5-6% improvement over the standard interpreter on x86_64 Linux.
标签: Python, CPython, JIT, performance, macOS, AArch64, x86_64, Linux, programming, interpreter
